_comment: Single source of truth for metric metadata + MVI auto-recommend eligibility. Edit by hand to curate. Required per-metric fields: metric_key, label, category, unit, type, enabled, allowAutoRecommend. Optional fields you may add per metric: description, subcategory, priority, keywords (array), displayOrder, viz (hints), ai (explanation meta). type is one of: need|response|statistical|raw_count|demographic_slice. Only metrics with enabled==true AND allowAutoRecommend==true are offered as automatic MVI recommendations (and only type=='need' should be auto-recommendable); the manual Indicators search still spans ALL metrics. First pass auto-classified by heuristics — review and adjust.
